summary: Excellent audience recording captures a rare, heavy Atlanta show highlighted by a smoking Help > Slipknot > Franklin’s and a stellar He's Gone.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear audience source that conveys the room’s energy while delivering superb clarity. The performance is described as a solid “Night 2” slow burn with standout moments – an incendiary Help > Slipknot > Franklin’s sequence and one of the best renditions of He's Gone ever heard. Vince Welnick is noted as still finding his footing, while Bob Weir carries the rhythm section.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and the high‑fidelity audience recording, leaving little doubt of a top‑tier show and source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Rare native AUD with exceptional clarity, balanced crowd presence, and vivid room ambience; described as “above average” even for the famed Atlanta/Athens audience recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Typical Night 2 vibe – a relaxed, slow‑burn set that builds momentum toward the second act, highlighted by strong transitions and sustained energy.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob Weir carries the rhythm section while keyboards stay back.
band_member_comments.Keys: Vince Welnick appears tentative, still getting his sea legs on this night.
